parameters.url: ={{ (function() { const params = []; if ($json.projectSlug) { params.push('project=' + encodeURIComponent($json.projectSlug)); } if ($json.personaSlug) { params.push('persona=' + encodeURIComponent($json.personaSlug)); } return 'https://mcp-vector.mjames.dev/api/prompts/resolve?' + params.join('&'); })() }}
